opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The sores on their face are spreading so fast, they are constantly weeping yellow fluid, and it's too painful for them to eat.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Fast-spreading weeping crusty sores around my child's nose and mouth.

symptom_narrative.onset: small sore under the nose 48h ago after a cold
symptom_narrative.character: golden/honey-coloured crusts on red skin, weeping yellow fluid
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: spreading fast; sore when moving the mouth; too painful to eat well
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: around the nose and mouth, spreading to the chin
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: mild itch; some crusts pull when the mouth moves; no high fever
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: kept home from childcare due to contagion

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: siblings at home; shared hand towels in the bathroom

objective_data_offered.value: golden-yellow crusts on bright red skin around the nose and mouth, weeping, with a few separate spots on the chin
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: parent's description/camera; cannot palpate for deeper spread
